creator: ivan@drm.su
text:
This GPU works with renoir firmware although it has a dedicated green sardine firmware from AMD.

Please add missing green sardine firmware to improve support for new AMD Ryzen 5000 series.

This commit removed the support:
https://github.com/freebsd/drm-kmod-firmware/commit/0382c95abdcd14d14696628c61f6354553fc70a8
